title: manifest.json persistence
outcome: ReadManifest/WriteManifest/WriteCache/ReadCache in internal/sources/manifest.go; TestManifestPersistence and TestReadManifestMissingReturnsEmpty pass

notes.msg: Implemented ReadManifest/WriteManifest/WriteCache/ReadCache in internal/sources/manifest.go. ReadManifest returns empty Manifest (no error) when file is absent; WriteManifest writes atomically via temp-file rename. TestManifestPersistence and TestReadManifestMissingReturnsEmpty both pass. go build ./... clean.
